title: Surat Thani、Surat Thani — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Surat Thani、Surat Thani的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Surat Thani是Surat Thani的一個城市，人口約130,000。The gateway to the Gulf of Thailand islands, this provincial capital offers a very low cost of living and easy access to Koh Samui, Koh Phangan, and Koh Tao.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
